---
title: "gruppemde_uge_9"
subtitle: "`gruppemde_uge_9`"
description: "gruppemde_uge_9"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/gruppemde_uge_9/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                             | Title                          | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                             |
|----------------------------------|--------------------------------|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                          | The unique name of the event   | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                      |
| `center`                         | Research center                | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                   |
| `date_group_meeting_9`           | date_group_meeting_9           | date   | Date for group meeting. Group meeting week 9.                                                                                                           |
| `staff_initials_group_meeting_9` | staff_initials_group_meeting_9 | string | Initials of the dietitian responsible for conducting the group meeting. Group meeting week 9.                                                           |
| `attended_group_meeting_9`       | attended_group_meeting_9       | string | Indicates participant's attendance to the group meeting. Group meeting week 9.                                                                          |
| `weight_group_meeting_9`         | weight_group_meeting_9         | number | Participant's weight in kilograms, measured with light clothing using the BMI scale in room 1.15. Measured to the nearest 0.1 kg. Group meeting week 9. |
| `remarks_group_meeting_9`        | remarks_group_meeting_9        | string | Indicates whether there are any special remarks regarding the participant and what they are. Group meeting week 9.                                      |

: Fields in the `gruppemde_uge_9` resource.
